mapper.select: SELECT tbtrRsv.RSV_NO, tbtrRsv.USR_ID, tbtrRsv.SCHD_NO, tbtrRsv.TOT_AMT, tbtrRsv.SEAT_CNT, COUNT(cnclRsv.RSV_NO) AS CNCL_CNT FROM TBTR_RSV tbtrRsv LEFT JOIN TBTR_RSV cnclRsv ON cnclRsv.ORSV_NO = tbtrRsv.RSV_NO AND cnclRsv.RSV_ST_CD = '2' WHERE tbtrRsv.RSV_NO = #{rsvNo} AND tbtrRsv.RSV_ST_CD = '0' GROUP BY tbtrRsv.RSV_NO, tbtrRsv.USR_ID, tbtrRsv.SCHD_NO, tbtrRsv.TOT_AMT, tbtrRsv.SEAT_CNT
SELECT tbtrRsvSeat.SEAT_NO, tbtrRsvSeat.SEAT_PRC FROM TBTR_RSV_SEAT tbtrRsvSeat WHERE tbtrRsvSeat.RSV_NO = #{rsvNo} ORDER BY tbtrRsvSeat.SEAT_NO

SELECT tbtrRsv.RSV_NO, tbtrRsv.SCHD_NO, tbevEvnt.EVNT_NM, tbevSchd.SCHD_DT, tbtrRsv.SEAT_CNT, tbtrRsv.TOT_AMT, tbtrRsv.TRX_DT, CASE WHEN COUNT(cnclRsv.RSV_NO) > 0 THEN '2' ELSE '0' END AS RSV_ST_CD, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tbtrRsvSeat.SEAT_NO ORDER BY tbtrRsvSeat.SEAT_NO) AS SEAT_NOS FROM TBTR_RSV tbtrRsv JOIN TBEV_SCHD tbevSchd ON tbevSchd.SCHD_NO = tbtrRsv.SCHD_NO JOIN TBEV_EVNT tbevEvnt ON tbevEvnt.EVNT_NO = tbevSchd.EVNT_NO JOIN TBTR_RSV_SEAT tbtrRsvSeat ON tbtrRsvSeat.RSV_NO = tbtrRsv.RSV_NO LEFT JOIN TBTR_RSV cnclRsv ON cnclRsv.ORSV_NO = tbtrRsv.RSV_NO AND cnclRsv.RSV_ST_CD = '2' WHERE tbtrRsv.USR_ID = #{usrId} AND tbtrRsv.RSV_ST_CD = '0' GROUP BY tbtrRsv.RSV_NO, tbtrRsv.SCHD_NO, tbevEvnt.EVNT_NM, tbevSchd.SCHD_DT, tbtrRsv.SEAT_CNT, tbtrRsv.TOT_AMT, tbtrRsv.TRX_DT ORDER BY tbtrRsv.TRX_DT DESC
